name: @panda-chat-widget/basic-html

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @panda-chat-widget/loader build && mkdir -p vendor && cp ../../packages/loader/dist/panda-chat-widget-loader.js vendor/panda-chat-widget-loader.js
scripts.typecheck: sh -c 'if find src -type f \( -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.tsx" \) 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false; else echo "TODO: add basic HTML TypeScript sources"; fi'
scripts.lint: echo "TODO: lint command not implemented yet for basic HTML host-page example"
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build

description: Owns the future basic HTML host-page example.
